title-group.article-title: International Society of Sports Nutrition Position Stand: protein and exercise

sec.title: Introduction
sec.p: Protein intake is a key driver of muscle protein synthesis after resistance exercise.
The optimal per-meal dose ranges from 0.3 to 0.4 g per kg of body mass.

sec.title: Methods
sec.p: We searched the literature for randomized controlled trials.

ref-list.ref: cited reference (should not appear in output)
